title: sjzxdgy
description: Delta Force: Red Wolf – High-Mobility Combat Mod
body:
Delta Force: Red Wolf – High-Mobility Operator Mod for Minecraft

Step into the boots of Red Wolf, the legendary突击 operator from Delta Force, now fully realized in Minecraft! This mod brings a complete, polished combat kit designed for speed, aggression, and tactical dominance.
Core Abilities
Powered Exoskeleton – Right-click with the exoskeleton item to activate 30 seconds of Speed II and Jump Boost II. Leap over enemies, scale walls, and outrun anyone. Cooldown: 90 seconds.

Triple-Shot Grenade Launcher – Fire three bouncing projectiles in quick succession. Each grenade can ricochet off walls up to 3 times. When it hits an enemy, it marks them for 2 seconds, then triggers a delayed area explosion. The explosion damages only entities
Balanced & Server-Friendly

All abilities feature custom sounds, particles, and visual feedback. Cooldowns are tuned for fair PvP and adventure maps. The mod works on both client and server, though both sides must install it for full functionality. No external dependencies required.

Why Download?

If you love fast-paced combat, operator-style kits, or want to bring a touch of Delta Force into your Minecraft world, Red Wolf delivers. Whether you're building a PvP arena, an action adventure map, or just want to feel like a one-man army – this mod is for you.

Requires: Minecraft 1.20.1, Forge.
Works on: Client & Server (both required).
